channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Essex driver fined after using vehicle horn to attract a friend near train station
item.description: A 52-year-old driver from Essex has received a criminal conviction and been ordered to pay a total of £266 in fines and court costs after using his vehicle horn to attract the attention of a friend. J...

item.title: Online campaign intensifies pressure on Australia’s gas tax system
item.description: The article examines how an online movement campaigning for changes to Australia’s Petroleum Resource Rent Tax (PRRT) has gained momentum through social media and political frustration over low tax re...

item.title: Opinion: Viral bhangra dancing video sparks debate on immigration and cultural integration in Canada
item.description: This opinion article discusses a viral social media controversy sparked by a short video showing two Indian-Canadian men joyfully performing bhangra in the snow while wearing Montreal Canadiens hockey...

item.title: Lewis Capaldi says Sam Fender and Grian Chatten encouraged him to take more creative risks in the studio
item.description: Lewis Capaldi has spoken about the influence that his friendships with Sam Fender and Fontaines D.C. frontman Grian Chatten have had on his recent approach to music and songwriting. In an interview wi...

item.title: Weekly Canadian business update: Tim Hortons expansion, new CRTC streaming rules, and Newfoundland–Quebec energy negotiations
item.description: This weekly business digest highlights several major developments across Canada’s corporate, regulatory, and energy sectors. Restaurant Brands International has announced an expansion plan for Tim Hor...

item.title: DCI arrests suspect over KSh 7.5 million fake gold fraud targeting retired teacher
item.description: The Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) has arrested a suspect linked to a sophisticated fake gold investment scam that defrauded a 61-year-old retired teacher of more than KSh 7.5 million. T...

item.title: NBI labels Senator Bato dela Rosa ‘armed and dangerous’ as ICC warrant manhunt continues
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) has officially classified Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa as “armed and dangerous” as authorities continue efforts to serve an arrest warrant issued by the I...

item.title: The financial and personal risks behind side hustles in South Africa
item.description: South Africa’s evolving economic landscape has seen a sharp rise in side hustles and gig work as households grapple with high debt levels and persistently low savings. According to the South African R...

item.title: Northeast troops neutralise six insurgents, rescue abducted victims and recover explosives in Borno and Yobe operations
item.description: Troops under Operation Hadin Kai and Operation Desert Sanity recorded major operational successes across Borno and Yobe states after carrying out coordinated offensives against suspected Boko Haram an...

item.title: China deploys over 100 naval and coast guard vessels near Taiwan amid rising tensions
item.description: Taiwan’s security chief has stated that China has significantly increased its maritime presence by deploying more than 100 vessels across regional waters, intensifying concerns over security in the Ta...

item.title: Lee Andrews detained in Dubai amid multiple fraud allegations, according to family reports
item.description: Lee Andrews, the husband of television personality Katie Price, has reportedly been arrested and is being held in a prison in Dubai, according to statements made by his father. The development follows...

item.title: Body Camera Footage Shows Police Informing Dominic Russo’s Mother About Fatal 2022 Crash
item.description: TMZ published newly resurfaced police body camera footage showing the emotional moment officers informed Christine Russo that her son, Dominic Russo, had died following the 2022 high-speed crash invol...

item.title: Mantra Tanzania expands Mkuju River uranium project with local employment and training in Namtumbo
item.description: Mantra Tanzania Ltd is continuing with the development of the Mkuju River uranium project in Namtumbo District, a major mining investment supported by Uranium One Group under Russia’s Rosatom State Co...

item.title: Delhi High Court permits Vinesh Phogat to compete in Asian Games selection trials under supervision
item.description: The Delhi High Court has allowed renowned Indian wrestler Vinesh Phogat to participate in the upcoming Asian Games selection trials, stating that her inclusion is necessary in the interest of sports a...

item.title: Banker Comments on the Good Chemistry Between Mommy Ganda and Long in Kapamilya Deal or No Deal
item.description: In the latest episode of the popular ABS-CBN game show Kapamilya Deal or No Deal, the banker took notice of the strong chemistry shared by hosts Mommy Ganda and Long. This observation has caught the a...

item.title: Controversy follows naming of Site C dam after former premier John Horgan and Indigenous designation of reservoir
item.description: The naming of British Columbia’s Site C hydroelectric project has sparked mixed and often critical reactions in northeastern B.C., reflecting the decades-long controversy surrounding the dam’s constru...

item.title: Brooklyn Sports Bar Becomes Gathering Place for Knicks and Arsenal Fans During Rare Winning Moments
item.description: The article highlights the growing excitement surrounding a Brooklyn sports bar called FancyFree, where devoted fans of the New York Knicks and Arsenal gather to watch games and celebrate long-awaited...

item.title: Emily In Paris to conclude with sixth season on Netflix
item.description: Netflix has confirmed that the popular romantic comedy series ‘Emily In Paris’ will come to an end with its upcoming sixth season, currently being filmed in Greece. Despite speculation suggested by it...

item.title: UDSM receives international funding to expand food security and supply chain research in Africa
item.description: The University of Dar es Salaam (UDSM), through its Business School, has secured close to Sh6 billion (€1.98 million) in funding to support research, innovation and human capital development in sustai...

item.title: Becky Barnicoat cartoon explores the escalating complexity of organising modern life
item.description: This illustrated piece by Becky Barnicoat presents a humorous take on the challenges of getting one’s life in order, particularly within a modern, often chaotic context. Structured around the idea of ...
